mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.shop_name AS shopName, m.shop_desc AS shopDesc, m.contact_name AS contactName, m.contact_phone AS contactPhone, m.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM merchant_goods mg WHERE mg.merchant_id = m.id AND mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.sale_status = 'ON') AS productCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(mg.sale_count) FROM merchant_goods mg WHERE mg.merchant_id = m.id AND mg.deleted = 0), 0) AS totalSales FROM merchant_info m WHERE m.id = #{merchantId} AND m.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
